title: Chipotle
html:
Stub. First mentioned in 2025 07 17 screenshot 2025 07 17 at 9 13 52 pm bb1a5662.

Build-your-own bowl/burrito chain. Probably the proof case for BroMenu / anabolic scoring — user-assembled meals mean the protein-ratio is selectable, which is exactly what the app's recommendation surface is for. First nutrition scrape in the July 17–18 burst (9:13 p.m. on 2025-07-17, before the 4 a.m. Taco Bell + Wingstop + Little Caesars run).

related.label: Brotein restaurants seed — 25 fast-food chains with bro-coded copy
Chipotle full nutrition table — proteins, salsas, queso, sides, Pepsi
